def: s.f. A female dwarf.
s.f. A leech (syn. joṅk).
s.f. = S وامتو वामत्व vāmatva, s.m. Contrariety, perverseness; — wickedness; craftiness; — disfavour.
s.m. = S وامتا वामता vāmatā, s.f. Contrariety, perverseness; — wickedness; craftiness; — disfavour.
s.f. A mare; — a she-ass; — a young female elephant; — a female jackal.
adj. In debt (syn. qarẓ-dār); — distressed, unfortunate.
s.f. Vomiting, sickness, nausea, qualmishness; vomit; — an emetic
subs: s.m. A name of fire; — a rogue, cheat.

def: adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Vomiting, being sick; inclined to vomit; — one who vomits, or who is sick at stomach.
adj. & s.m. Loving, enamoured (of); — a lover; — name of the famous lover of ʻAẕrā.
adv. (dialec.) = وهان wahāṅ, q.v.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

ety: Ap. Prk. वँओ,fem. विँआ; Prk. मओ, fem. मिआ; S. म+कः, fem. म+इका
def: suff. (f. wīṅ), added to cardinal numbers (after the fourth) to form the ordinals; e.g. pāṅć-wāṅ (f. -wīṅ), the fifth; — bārah-wāṅ, the twelfth
subs: the same form repeated has a distributive signification
e.g. das-wāṅ-das-wāṅ, Every tenth; by tens; ten to each.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: suff. = بان bān, q.v.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: s.m. Blowing; — living; going, moving; rolling; surging; a flood; a heavy sea; — the high wave in Indian rivers (com. called 'the bore;' see bān); — a perfume, fragrance.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: s.m. A mat of straw; — a hole in the wall of a house.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: s.m. A shaft, an arrow, a dart (i.q. bān, q.v.); — the feathered part of an arrow; — a symbolical expression for the number five (from the five arrows of Kām-dev); — a kind of reed or cane; a pipe, flute; — fire; — a kind of rocket (used in battle), a sky rocket, a grenade; — udder (of a cow); — name of an Asur (a son of Rājā Bali, an enemy of Vishṇu, and favourite of Śiva)
subs: (˚na+as˚), s.m. The Asur or demon Vāṇ
s.f. The bed or couch of arrows (a peculiar method of transfixing each other with arrows practised by the gods in their mutual strifes)
part. adj. (f. -ī), Slain by an arrow or a dart
s.f. The wife of the Asur Vān.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: s.m. A forest, jungle, wood, &c. (i.q. ban, q.v.); — water; a fountain, spring; a cascade; — dwelling in a forest; — residence abroad; — dwelling-place, abode, residence, house
subs: (na˚+āś˚), s.m. Abode in the forest, the third āśram or stage in a Brāhmaṇ's life, when he becomes a Vāna-prasth or hermit
(˚na+āś), adj. & s.m. Living in a forest; — an inhabitant of a forest or wood
(˚na+an˚), s.m. The skirts of a wood; neighbourhood of a forest
(˚na+an˚), s.m. The middle or interior of a wood; — another wood
or van-prasthāyī, adj. & s.m. = ban-prasth, q.v.
(f. -ikā), or van-ćārī (f. -iṇī), or van-ćar (f. -ī), adj. & s.m. = ban-ćar, q.v.
s.m. 'Forest-king,' an epithet of the lion
adj. & s.m. (f. -inī), Being or abiding in a forest; — a hermit, an anchorite (syn. van-vāsī)
part. adj. (f. -ā), Situate or being in a forest; sylvan; wild; savage
s.m. A species of arum, A. colocasia
s.m. Honey produced in the jungle, wild honey
(f. -ā), or van-vāsī (f. -inī), adj. & s.m. = ban-bās, or ban-bāsī, q.v.
vulg. ban-bāsī, s.f. Dwelling in the forest; — the state of one who dwells in the forest; the life of a hermit
(vane, S. loc. of vana), adj. & s.m. = van-ćar or ban-ćar, q.v. (For other compounds see ban.)

def: suff. (f. -vatī), forming adjectives of possession from substantives; e.g. dhan-wān, 'possessing wealth, wealthy,' fr. dhan, 'wealth.'
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: adj. Belonging or relating to a wood or forest; — relating to a dwelling in a wood or to a house, &c.; — s.m. A number of woods, a collection of groves or thickets
subs: vulg. bān-prasth, s.m. A Brāhmaṇ of the third order who has passed through the stages of student and householder and has left his house and family for the forest (see āśram); a hermit, an anchorite; — the tree Bassia latifolia; — the palās-tree, Butea frondosa.
wety: Borrowed from Sanskrit -वान् (-vān), masculine nominative singular of -वत् (-vat).

def: s.m. = S ونانتر वनान्तर vanāntar, s.m. See s.v. ون van.
s.m. = S ونانت वनान्त vanānt, s.m. See s.v. ون van.
s.m. (f. -ī), A monkey; an ape.
s.f. A female monkey; — cowach, Carpopogon pruriens.

ety: vanas, prob. a form of the gen. of vana
def: s.m. 'Lord of the forest,' a large forest-tree; — a large tree bearing fruit, but apparently having no blossoms (as several species of the fig, the jack-tree, &c.); — a tree (generally); — an ascetic, a hermit, an anchorite.
s.m. = S وناشري वनाश्रय vanāśray, adj. See s.v. ون van.
adj. = S وناشرم वनाश्रम vanāśram, s.m. See s.v. ون van.
adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Deceiving, cheating; fraudulent, dishonest, deceitful, crafty; — a deceiver, rogue, cheat, knave, a vile fellow; — a jackal; — a musk-rat; — a tame ichneumon.
s.m. = S ونچنا वंचना vaṅćanā, s.f. The act of deceiving, cheating, defrauding; deception, deceit, fraud, knavery; — illusion, delusion, hallucination.
s.f. = S ونچن वंचन vaṅćan, s.m. The act of deceiving, cheating, defrauding; deception, deceit, fraud, knavery; — illusion, delusion, hallucination.
s.f. Wish, desire. (This word is of com. occurrence in Hindī as a suffix in the form ās, or āsā (for S. वाञ्छकः), e.g. miṭhās; niṅdāsā.)
s.m. Wishing, desiring.
adj. (f. -inī), Wishing, wishful, desirous; lustful.
s.f. A libidinous woman; a wanton.
part. (f. -ā), Wished, desired, longed for.
part. (f. -ā), Deceived, tricked, cheated, defrauded, deluded, imposed upon.
adj. (f. -ī) = vaṅćak, q.v.
suff., used to form possessives, i.q. want, and vān, qq.v. (cf. mand).

adj. & s.m. (f. -ā), Maimed; defective; crippled; — tailless, docked; — impotent, emasculated; — one who has lost his hands and feet; one whose hands have been cut off; — a tailless animal; — a man who is circumcised, or who has no prepuce.

ety: S. वन्दकः; — also S. वन्दा, f.
def: s.m. = bandā, 'mistletoe,' q.v.
s.f. An unchaste woman.
s.m. The act of praising; praise, reverence, adoration, worship; salutation, homage, obeisance (to a Brāhmaṇ or superior by touching the feet, &c.); — flattery; — the face, mouth (i.q. vadan).
s.f. Praising; praise, worship, adoration; prayer.
s.f. Making obeisance, adoring; reverence, worship, adoration; — begging, soliciting, asking (for); — a drug for reviving the dead.
part. adj. (f. -ā), To be praised, or worshipped, or adored; praiseworthy; adorable; laudable, commendable, estimable; — to be saluted or made obeisance to.
s.m. corr. of bandhī = bandī, 'prisoner, captive.'

s.m. One who praises or extols, a praiser, panegyrist, encomiast; a flatterer; a bard, herald (whose business it is to proclaim the titles of a great man as he passes along, or who sings the praises of a prince in his presence, or accompanies an army to chaunt martial songs).
s.m. A prisoner, &c. (i.q. bandī, q.v.).
part. (f. -ā), Praised, extolled, adored, celebrated.
part. adj. (f. -ā), To be praised, praiseworthy, commendable, &c. (i.q. vandanīya, q.v.).
adj. (f. -ī) = banelā, q.v. (and cf. vanya).
adj. (f. -ī), Relating or belonging to a wood, or to water; — s.m. The fragrant grass Cyperus rotundus.
s.m. = بنگ baṅg, 'tin,' &c. q.v.
s.f. A bangle, &c. (i.q. baṅgrī, q.v.).
adj. & s.m. corr. of وانمي vān-may, q.v.
adv. = wahāṅ, q.v.; — s.f. = bāṅh, q.v.
s.m., corr. of vahnī, q.v.
s.f. A small forest or wood (i.q. banī, q.v.).
s.f. Sound, speech, language; voice; praise, laudation; a literary production; — a name of Sarasvatī (the goddess of speech and eloquence).
adj. (f. -inī), Having an arrow or arrows, armed with arrows; — speaking; voiced (used as last member of comp., e.g. mr̤idu-vāṇī, 'sweet-voiced').
s.f. Weaving; — a (weaver's) loom.
s.m. Trade, traffic, &c. (i.q. bāṇijya, q.v.).
s.m. = baṇik, q.v.
s.f. A sharp or clever woman, an intriguing woman; — an actress; a nāć-girl; — an intoxicated woman; — a species of metre.
s.f. (fr. vanita, 'solicited; loved,' &c.), A loved woman; a wife; a mistress; — a woman (in general).
adj. (Old H.) = vāṇī, q.v.; — 2˚ adj. = vāneya, q.v.
s.m. corr. of banjar, q.v.
s.m. = بنك baṅk, q.v.
s.f. The pommel of a saddle.
s.f. = baṅkāʼī, q.v.
s.f. A pleonastic form = vaṅk, q.v.
s.f. A kind of curved knife (syn. bićhuʼā).
adj. (f. -ī), Consisting of words; relating to speech; endowed with speech; — eloquent, rhetorical; — loquacious; — s.m. Speech, lauguage; eloquence, rhetoric.
s.f. An epithet of Sarasvatī (the goddess of speech).
s.m. The opening or commencement of a speech, an exordium, introduction.
s.m. = vaṅś = bans, q.v.

s.m. A bamboo; a bamboo-cane, a staff; — a reed-pipe, tube, pipe, flute, fife; — the backbone, spine; — the line of a pedigree or genealogy, lineage, race, &c. (i.q. bans, q.v.); — offspring, son, child; — an assemblage, a multitude, host
subs: adj. (f. -ā), To be possessed by a family, hereditary; — (S. -bhojyam), s.m. An hereditary estate
s.m. History of any race or dynasty; genealogical account of the doings of a family
s.f., or vaṅś-loćan, s.m., or vaṅś-loćanā, s.f. = bans-loćan, q.v.
s.m. Family, usage; — family affairs, family history
adj. Descended or inherited lineally; lineally acquired, obtained by family inheritance, hereditary
or vaṅśī-dhar, vulg. bansī-dhar, adj. & s.m. Holding or carrying a flute or pipe; — a flute-player, piper; — a name of Krishṇ; — a proper name. (For other compounds see bans.)

def: s.m. A joint in a bamboo; — a kind of small fish, Cynoglosus lingua.
s.f. See s.v. vaṅś.
s.f. Bamboo-manna.
s.f. & adj. = bāṅsī, q.v.
adj. Pertaining to a family, &c. (i.q. bansī, q.v.).
s.f. A flute, &c. (i.q. bansī, q.v.).
adj. & s.m. See s.v. vaṅś.
adj. & s.m. See s.v. vaṅś.
adj. (f. -ī), Belonging or relating to a bamboo; — pertaining to a family, &c.; lineal; genealogical; — (S. vaṅśikam), s.m. Aloe-wood, Amyris agallocha.
s.f. Aloe-wood, Agallochum.
suff., used to derive possessional adjectives from substantives (i.q. vān, q.v.), e.g. dhan-want, 'wealthy' (fr. dhan, 'wealth'); sog-want, 'sorrowful' (fr. sog, 'grief').
s.m. Part, portion, share (i.q. baṅṭ, q.v.); — the handle of a sickle.

ety: Prk. वंतओ and वंतिआ; S. वत्+अकः and इका
def: suff. = want, q.v.
adj. & s.m. (f. -ikā), Dividing, apportioning, distributing; — an apportioner, distributer; — s.m. Part, &c. ( = vaṇṭ).
s.m. The act of apportioning, dividing into shares, distributing, partitioning, dealing out.

ety: Prk. वंतओ and वंतिआ; S. वत्+अकः and इका
def: suff. = want, q.v.
s.f. A multitude of groves; a large forest; — abundance of water; a flood, an inundation, a deluge; — the plant Physalis flexuosa.
adj. (f. -ā), Of or belonging to a forest or wood; living in woods; growing or produced in a wood or forest; sylvan, rural; wild, savage
s.m. A kind of holy basil, the black species of tulsī.
s.m. Shearing; shaving; — sowing seed; — semen virile.
s.f. A barber's shop.

ety: wā, 'back,' q.v.+pas = old P. pasā; Pārsī paś; Zend paśća; S. पश्च
def: adv. Behind; afterwards; back, back again; returning; then, again
subs: v.n. To come back, to return
v.n. To go back, to return; to retire, to recede
or wāpas karnā, v.t. To give back, to return; to restore, to refund, to reimburse
v.t. To hold or keep back; to detain; to retard
v.t. To return, &c. (i.q. wāpas denā, q.v.); — to send back; to remend
v.t. To take back; — to claim back
To obtain or get back; to be restored (to, -ko).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian واپس (wāpas). Compare Punjabi ਵਾਪਸ (vāpas).

def: adj. Return (as fare, or a ticket, &c.); — s.f. Return; reversion; refund; remand; — a return-ticket (by rail, or ḍāk, &c.).

ety: wā-pas, q.v. + īn = Zend yaṅh = S. ईयान् or यान् (base ईयस् or यस्
def: adj. The last; latter; posterior; hindmost.
s.f. A large well or oblong reservoir of water (esp. one with steps down to it; see bāʼolī)
s.f. = vāpī, and bāʼolī, qq.v.
s.m. One who sows or plants, planter, sower, husbandman; — one who fertilizes or fecundates; a procreator, progenitor, father; — a poet; sage.
s.m. = vapus, q.v.
s.m. Form, figure, shape, body, person.
s.m. Form, figure, shape, body, person.
s.m. A knock, stroke, blow; a cut, gash, wound; — attack, assault; — blame (of or for); — heavy or sore burden (of)
subs: (-par), or wār mārnā (-ko), To strike or administer a blow, &c.
(-par), To make an attack (on), to attack, assault, charge.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

def: s.m. A multitude, quantity, heap; a flock, herd, troop; — time; — a day (of the week, e.g. Som-wār, 'Monday'); — a moment; time, turn; vicissitude; occasion, opportunity; — a name of Śiva; — anything which causes an obstruction, a gate, door, door-way; — a vessel for holding spirituous liquor; — s.f. Time (considered as long or excessive, and as taken up or used), delay, waiting; patience; — vacant or unemployed time, leisure
subs: (-kā), The opportunity to be lost; to miss (one's) turn or chance; to miss, to fall short (of), to fail
v.n. To make delay, to delay
v.n. To have (one's) turn; — to get an opportunity; — to find or have leisure
adv. Repeatedly, again and again (see bār-bār; bārambār).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

def: s.m. The near bank (of a river, &c.), this side; — adv. On this side
subs: or wār-ā-pār, adv. On this side and on that, on both sides; through and through, right through; across; — s.m. Bounds, limits
To pass right through; to get across; — to be tided over (as a difficulty, &c.); to be settled (as a dispute, &c.).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

def: s.m. Water (i.q. vāri, q.v.).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

ety: S. वाटं; or contrac. of wāṛī
def: s.f. Enclosed ground or space, enclosure; place; dwelling-place (used as last member of comp., e.g. satī-wāṛ, q.v.).
conj. And if.
suff. = wāl = wālā, q.v.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

ety: Pehl. & Pārsī var; Zend vara (or vare), rt. var; S. वर, rt. वर् (वृ, वृणोति)
def: suff. Having, possessing, endowed with, full of (e.g. umed-wār, 'hopeful'); — becoming, befitting, suiting, fit, suitable (for), worthy (of; — e.g. shāh-wār, 'befitting, or worthy of, a king'; gosh-wār, 'becoming or adorning the ear,' 'an ear-ring'); — like, resembling, in the manner of, after the fashion of, according to; after or according to the details of (e.g. ẕarra-wār, 'like an atom'; — in this sense it is often added to substantives to form adjectives, e.g. mahīne-wār, 'monthly'; kisht-wār, According to the fields or the crops); — enough or sufficient for, or a quantity sufficient for (e.g. jāma-wār, 'sufficient for a garment'; cf. jāma bhar); — the suffix is sometimes redundant, e.g. sazā-wār = sazā, 'deserving,' &c.
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

def: s.m. A load or burden (e.g. ḵẖar-wār = ḵẖar-bār, 'an ass-load'); — time, turn (i.q. bār, and H. wār).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

def: (i.q. wār, q.v.), suff. Possessing, having, enjoying, &c. (added to substantives to form adjectives, e.g. jān-war, 'possessing life; a living creature, an animal'; — nām-war, 'having a name, famous').
s.f. An offering waved round the heads of a bride and bridegroom and distributed as alms (cf. warā-pherī; wārī-pherī).
wety: Inherited from Sauraseni Prakrit 𑀧𑀸𑀟𑁄 (pāḍo), from Sanskrit पात (pāta, “attack”).

ety: S. वार्य+कं, rt. वृ; — or wār(nā), q.v.+Prk. एअव्वं = S. इतव्यं
def: s.m. Blessing, boon; — goods, possessions, wealth, lucre; — benefit, gain, earnings; — saving; thrift; — cheapness; — a victim, a sacrifice, an offering, anything devoted (syn. nićhāwar); — adj. Cheap
subs: s.m. The circumambulation of a thing sacrificed, or the waving an offering round the head of a person (see wār-pherī; wārī-pherī)
s.m. pl. Possessions, wealth; gains, earnings
To acquire riches, to make money; to earn
(-ke), To become possessed of wealth and comfort (esp. one who was previously in poverty), to become well-off.

def: s.m. Place, dwelling-place; — division (of a town), quarter; ward (where people of the same trade or caste dwell, — e.g. telī-wāṛā; ćamār-wāṛā); — country, territory, dominion (e.g. raj-wāṛā; bais-wāṛā).
adj. Situated on this side (of a river, &c.); near, close by; — inferior
subs: (obl. of warā), adv. On this side (of); near; — below
v.n. To draw near, to approach
v.n. To fall on this side (of, -ke); to fall short (of).

def: prep. Behind; beyond, on the other side (of); — after, subsequently (to); — besides, except.

s.f. (m. vara), An excellent woman; — name of several planṭs and vegetable products; Cissampelos hexandra; Clypea hermandifolia; Asparagus racemosus; Cocculus cordifolius; — the three kinds of myrobalan; — a sort of perfume.
(inf. n. of ورع 'to be timid,' &c.), s.m. & f. Timidity, cowardice; — apprehensiveness of doing wrong; abstinence from anything doubtful; — the fear of God; — temperance, continence, chastity.
s.m. A disease of the lungs; — man, men, mortals.
suff. (dialec. or rustic) = wālā, q.v.

adj. (f. -ā), Wished for, desirable, precious, excellent, best; eldest; — the best (of), most excellent or eminent; surpassing, exceeding, superior (to); preferable; beautiful; — s.m. Selecting, choosing; requesting, soliciting, entreating; — choice, election; wish, desire, request; boon, blessing, favour; anything chosen as a present, gift, reward, recompense (esp. the gift of a Brāhmaṇ or a deity); — any desirable object; benefit, advantage, privilege; — a dowry; charity, alms; bdellium; — a sparrow; — saffron; — one who chooses or selects, &c.; one who solicits a girl in marriage, a suitor, wooer, lover; a bridegroom; husband; — a dissolute man; a catamite
subs: (˚ra+ās˚), s.m. An excellent seat; the best seat; a throne
s.m. The granting of a boon
adj. Lavish of expenditure, extravagant, profuse, prodigal
vulg. varad, adj. (f. -ā), Granting wishes, conferring a boon or boons, ready to fulfil requests or answer prayers; propitious, favourable
s.f. A young woman, girl, virgin, maiden; — name of a river
s.m. The granting a boon or request; giving compensation or reward; benefaction; bestowal
s.f. 'The pointing out a suitor or husband,' negotiating a marriage
(-par), To continue or be superior (to); to prevail (against), to overcome, be victorious (over); to surpass, excel; — to gain, win
(˚ra+ūr˚), s.m. A beautiful thigh; — adj. Having beautiful thighs
(˚ra+īk˚), s.m. Looking out for a suitor or husband, negotiating a marriage.

def: adj. See s.v. vara or var.
part. adj. Wandered, gone astray; lost; — one who has wandered, &c.
s.m. pl. (of next), Those who have gone astray; the lost.

s.m. A boar, wild boar, hog; — name of Vishṇu in the third or boar-incarnation (in which he raised the earth from the bottom of the sea with his tusks); — an array of troops in the form of a boar; — name of one of the eighteen lesser divisions (dvīp) of the world; — a particular measure; — name of a sacred place.
adj. Belonging to a boar, boarish; — s.m. (f. -ī), A boar
subs: s.m. Name of a place of pilgrimage on the river Gomtī (about thirty-two miles south of Ayodhyānāth), celebrated as the birth-place of Vishṇu under the form of a boar (see avatār).

def: s.f. A sow; — name of one of the Mātr̤is or divine mothers attending on Skand; — the earth; — a measure; — a species of esculent root or yam.

adj. & s.m. Restraining, checking, preventing, hindering, obstructing, opposing, resisting, thwarting; — anything which restrains, or obstructs, &c.; an obstacle; — an opponent; — a horse; — one of a horse's paces; — seat (of pain); — a sort of fragrant grass.
adj. (f. -ā), Pitiable, miserable, unhappy, poor, wretched, low, vile; — impure; — s.m. A sinner, &c.; — a name of Śiva; — battle, war.
s.m. Leaf (of a tree, or of a book, or of silver or gold, &c.); silver-leaf, gold-leaf; page (of a book); — a slice; — a card
subs: (-kā), To slice, cut off a slice; — to page and line (a book)
(-ke), The leaves (of a book, &c.) to be scattered; — to become very thin; — to lose (one's) self-possession
(-kā), To cut a slice off (from); — to cut cards
s.m. A kind of intoxicating drug, Cannabis sativa (syn. bhang; sabzī)
s.m. The number of the page (of a book)
s.m. One who makes gold or silver leaves
(-kā), To cut off a slice (of), to slice
To beat out gold or silver leaf
s.f. Turning over the leaves (of a book)
(-kā), To turn down a leaf or page (of); to turn over the corner of a page.

ety: for A. ورقة waraqat, n. of un. fr. waraq
def: s.m. A leaf; — a paper; letter, billet; schedule.
adj. Of or relating to a leaf; leaf-like; — foliated; — flaky.
s.m. A wasp; hornet (i.q. varaṭ).
s.f. A wasp, &c. (i.q. varal; cf. burlā); — a goose (i.q. varaṭā).
s.m. Swelling; becoming inflated (the skin); becoming inflamed; — a swelling; inflammation; a tumour, an imposthume; — adj. Swollen, inflated; — distended (with rage, &c.); enraged, angry
subs: To swell (as any part of the body)
To be or become swollen or inflamed; — to be distended (with rage, &c.); to be enraged.

def: s.f. An excellent woman.
adv. = بارنبار bārambār, q.v.
s.m. restraining, keeping back: warding off; guarding, protecting, defending; defence, resistance, opposition; prohibition; obstacle, impediment; — armour, mail, a cuirass; — an elephant.
conj. = برن baran, q.v.

s.m. Screening, covering, protecting, supporting, nourishing; enclosing, encircling, surrounding, encompassing; keeping off, prohibiting; — choosing, selecting; choice of a bride; a promise of marriage; — (S. वरणः) a rampart, mound, surrounding wall, an outer enclosure; — a causeway, bridge; — the tree Capparis trifoliata, and Crataeva roxburghii; — a camel (see baran).
s.m. Averting (evil, &c. from), or that which averts (from); a sacrifice, an offering, oblation.
s.f. See برنا barnā.
adj. (f. -ikā), Born in the Ganges.
adj. (f. -ī), Born, or produced, in Banāras.
s.f. Banāras, the holy city of the Hindūs.
s.f. The city of Banāras or Benares (more usually written vārāṇasī).
s.f. Benares (more usually written vārāṇasī, q.v.).
s.m. A verandah; a portico.
s.f. A kind of mainā or thrush (syn. sārikā); — a dagger; knife; — the wick of a lamp.
s.m. The castor-oil tree, Ricinus communis.
s.m. A warrant, a writ
adv. i.q. wār-pār, q.v.s.v. wār.
(for A. ورثة waras̤at), s.m. pl. (of wāris̤), Heirs.
s.m. See s.v. vara or var.
part. adj. Delivered, saved; escaped; — humble; — s.m. One who is delivered, &c.
s.m. pl. (of wā-rasta), Those who are delivered; the saved.
s.f. Liberation, deliverance, salvation; — humility.
s.m. A kind of wasp; a hornet.
s.f. A kind of wasp; a hornet; — a goose.
s.m. A small shell used as a coin, a cowrie, Cyprœa moneta; — the seed-vessel of a lotus-flower; — a rope, cord, string.
s.f. = barāt, q.v.; — s.m. = barātī, q.v.
s.f. A kind of wasp; a hornet; — a goose.
s.m. (dialec. or Braj) = wārā, q.v.
s.m. A rose; — a flower; — leaf (of a flower), petal.
s.m. See s.v. vara or var.
s.m. A company or collection of old men; — old age; — imbecility or infirmity of old age.
s.m. Old age, senility; imbecility.
s.m. A bull; an ox; a bullock.
adj. (f. -ā), Increasing, growing, thriving, prosperous; — s.m. Name of a mountain and district (the modern Bardwān).

adj. Increasing, growing, thriving; — enlarging; causing to increase or thrive; magnifying; strengthening, invigorating; exhilarating, animating, making joyful; — s.m. (S. vardhanam), Increasing, growing, &c.; increase, growth; prosperity, success; — enlargement; a magnifying; elevation; — animation, exhilaration; — rearing, bringing up.
s.f. A broom, brush; — a small water-jar (of a particular shape).
part. (rt. vr̤idh), Increased, augmented; grown; expanded; extended, produced (as a line in geom.); thriven; — (rt. vardh) cut, cut off, divided.
s.f. Uniform (of a soldier, &c.); badge or dress of office (as of a peon, &c.)
subs: To sound the bugle for a dress-parade
s.m. An adjutant of native troops.

def: adv. See s.v. warā; — (dialec. in Oude, &c.), postpn. = liye, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. vara or var.
s.m. See the pop. form برگ barg
subs: vulg. barg-pad, s.m. Root of a square; square root
or varg-karm, s.m. An operation relating to square numbers
vulg. barg-ghan, s.m. The cube of a square
s.m. The square of a square, a biquadratic number
s.m. The square of a squared square, or the square of the fourth power
part. adj. Formed into classes, classified, arranged; — (in Alg.) raised to a square, squared. (For other compounds see barg.)

ety: fr. Pers. warg̠alānīdan = bar-g̠alān-īdan; — bar, prep. or prefix, q.v.+g̠alān (with caus. aff.), fr. S. गर् (गृ, गरति); or घर् (घृ, घरति)
def: v.t. To deceive, inveigle, decoy, entice, seduce, tempt, incite, instigate, actuate, provoke, exasperate.
s.m. The science taught by Vr̤ihaspati; rules of conduct, ethical precepts, ethics, morality.
s.m. The fruit of the Solanum jacquini (also written bārhat).
s.m. A peacock (cf. barhī).
s.m. (f.-iṇī), A peacock (i.q. warhī).
s.f. = varhiṇī, q.v.
s.f. A peahen (see varhī, and barhī).

s.m. A layer; a layer or seat of Kuśa grass; — Kuśa grass, Poa cynosuroides (the sacred grass used at certain religious ceremonies); — sacrifice, oblation; — fire; — light, lustre, splendour; — a kind of vegetable perfume
subs: (varhi, for varhis+sad), or barhi-shad, or varhishat, or barhishat, and varhishand, &c., s.m. A particular class of Pitṛis or Manes; — a Pitr̤i or deified progenitor
or barhish-matī, s.f. Name of a wife of Priya-vrat and daughter of Viśva-karmā; — name of a city in Brahmāvart.

ety: S. also वर्हिष्, but in comp.
def: s.m. = varhis, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. varis.
s.m. = varhishad, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. varis.
s.f. See s.v. varis.
s.m. Water; a fluid; — fluidity; — s.f. A name of Sarasvatī (the goddess of speech or eloquence); — a place for tying or fastening an elephant; — a captive, prisoner; — a symbol for the number four
subs: or vāri-pūrṇī, s.f. The plant Pistia straṭiotes
s.m. A current or flow of water; a waterfall, cascade, cataract
vulg. vārij, adj. & s.m. (f. -ā), Born, or produced, in or by water; — a conch-shell; any bivalve shell; — a lotus; — salt
vulg. or corr. wārī-ćār, adj. & s.m. (f. -ī), Living, or moving, in water; aquatic; — a fish; — any aquatic animal
vulg. vārid, adj. & s.m. Water-giving, yielding water; — a cloud
s.m. rumbling of the clouds; thunder
s.m. The aquatic plant Trapa bispinosa; and Pistia stratiotes
s.f. The aquatic plant Pistia stratiotes

def: s.f. A water-pot, pitcher; a milking-vessel; — a rope for fastening an elephant; — a hole or trap for catching elephants.

ety: i.q. wārā, q.v., with S. इका for क
def: s.f. A victim; — devoted one; — intj. My life! my darling! my precious one!
subs: s.f. Going round a person, or waving anything round the head of a person (as a sign of being an offering or sacrifice for his or her welfare); devoting oneself (for)
or wārī honā (-par), to sacrifice or devote oneself (for another, saying, 'I devote myself for thee,' — a phrase used by women; — syn. ṣadqa jānā).

def: s.f. A garden, &c. (i.q. bāṛī, q.v.; e.g. phūl-wāṛī, 'a flower-garden'); — place, enclosure; dwelling-place, hamlet (i.q. wāṛ, used as last member of compounds).
s.f. The plant Asparagus racemosus; — name of Ćhāyā, the wife of Sūrya (the Sun).
s.f. (dialec.) Quit-rent.
(rustic or dialec.) = wālī, fem. of wālā, q.v.

ety: act. part. of ورد 'to be present; to appear, to alight,' &c.
def: part. adj. & s.m. Being present; — alighting, descending, coming, arriving, approaching; — one who alights, or comes, or approaches; a comer, an arrival
subs: (for wārid-o-ṣādir), s.m. A comer and goer; a guest; a traveller
v.n. To come, to arrive; to descend, alight (on); to befall
wety: Borrowed from Arabic وارِد (wārid).

def: (S. vāri-da), s.m. = H وارج वारिज wārij (S. vāri-ja), s.m. See s.v. واري vāri.
wety: Borrowed from Arabic وارِد (wārid).

def: (pl. of wārid), s.f. pl. & sing. Events, occurrences, incidents, accidents, contingencies; — affrays, crimes; — an incident, occurrence, a circumstance; a conjuncture; a catastrophe; a casualty; a crime.
s.m. See s.v. واري vāri.
(S. vāri-ja), s.m. = H وارد वारिद wārid (S. vāri-da), s.m. See s.v. واري vāri.
s.m. = vāri, and vārij, qq.v.; — 2˚ corr. of bārīk, q.v.

ety: act. part. of ورث 'to receive by inheritance'
def: s.m. Heir; legatee; — owner, master, lord; protector; (hence, by women) husband
subs: or be-wāris̤a, adj. Heirless, having no heir (i.q. lā-wāris̤, q.v.).
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian وَارِث (wāris), from Arabic وَارِث (wāriṯ).

def: s.m. (f. -ā, or -ī), A hook; fish-hook.
s.m. (f. -ā, or -ī), A hook; fish-hook.
adj. (superlat. or vara), Most excellent, best, most preferable; dearest, most beloved; — widest, broadest, largest, greatest, most extensive (in these senses regarded as a superl. of uru).
s.f. Heritage.
part. (f. -ā), Warded off, prevented, hindered, restrained, impeded, obstructed.
s.m. Name of the eighteenth of the twenty-seven Yogas or astronomical divisions of the ecliptic.
s.m. Forbidding, prohibiting, &c. (see barjan).
part. adj. To be excluded; to be avoided or shunned, to be prohibited or forbidden; irregular; improper, censurable, wicked.

part. (f. -ā), Abandoned; excluded, rejected; avoided, shunned; relinquished; — forbidden, interdicted, unlawful; — left, remaining; omitted; excepted; — deprived (of), destitute (of), devoid (of), without.
adj. See s.v. vara or var.
s.f. Seeing; meeting with, finding, &c. (i.q. bar-ḵẖẉurd, q.v.s.v. bar, 'breast; fruit').

ety: war˚ = S. अवर or अवार+lā = Prk. ल्लओ = S. ल+कः
def: adj. & adv. Belonging to this side (of a river, &c.); — on this side (cf. urlā).
s.m. See برما barmā.
s.m. A title affixed to the names of Kshatriyas.

s.m. Colour, hue; class, &c. (i.q. barṇ or baran, q.v.); — form, figure; — dress, embellishment; theatrical dress; — the fineness or purity of gold (as ascertained by its streak on the touchstone); — fresh earth carried into hollows by means of water
subs: (˚ṇa+āś˚), s.m. Caste and order, class and stage of life; the status of a given class of society
s.m. pl. The four Hindū castes (viz. Brāhman, Kshatriya, Vaiśya, and Śūdra); — the four states of Hindū society (viz. Student, Householder, Mendicant, and Anchoret)
adj. Possessed of caste and order
vulg. barṇ-dūʼe, s.m. Two colours; — two castes or races; — two syllables
s.m. The particular duty or occupation of each caste or tribe
or varṇ-rekhā, s.f. A kind of white aluminous fossil (often confounded with chalk, of which it is a species)
adj. & s.m. (f. -ā), Belonging to the best of the tribes, of the best or highest caste; — a Brāhmaṇ or member of the highest caste
s.m. Order or succession of colours; — order of castes; — order or series of letters; alphabetical arrangement. the alphabet
(or barṇ) karnā, v.t. To hire a priest for the performance of sacrifice or for any religious ceremony
s.f. A dissertation or treatise on an alphabet
vulg. barṇ-mālā, or baran-mālā, s.f. Order or series of letters; the alphabet
s.m. (in Gram.) The change or substitution of one letter for another
s.m. Metre regulated by the number of syllables

ety: wār˚ = Prk. वार(इ) or वारे(इ) = S. वारय(ति), caus. of rt. वृ
def: v.t. To surround, encompass, encircle; to go round; — to ward off, keep off; to avert (from. -se); to wave (anything) round or over (one) as a means of averting (evil, &c.), or as a votive offering; to offer (in sacrifice, &c.); — to devote oneself (for).
conj. And if not, otherwise, or else; although.
s.m. Colouring, painting; delineation; description, &c. (i.q. barṇan, q.v.): varṇan karnā = barṇan karnā, q.v.
s.f. = varṇan, or barṇan, q.v.
s.m. See s.v. varṇ.
part. (f. -ā), Delineated; — described; related; explained; — praised, eulogized, extolled.
v.t. To explain, describe, relate, tell, narrate; to praise, extol (i.q. varṇan karnā).
s.m., &c. See s.v. vara or var.
adv. See s.v. wār.
s.m. A gardener (syn. bāg̠-bān; mālī).

ety: S. वर्षाः, nom. pl. of varsha, and of varshā
def: s.m. The season of the rains
subs: s.m. A drop of rain, rain-drop.

def: s.m. Rain, raining; a shower of rain; sprinkling, effusion; — the rainy season; — a cloud; — a year (see the pop. form baras); — a division of the earth or known world (nine such divisions are enumerated, viz. Kuru, Hiraṇmay, Ramyak, Ilāvrit, Hari, Ketu-mālā, Bhadrāśva, Kinnar, and Bhārat); India ( = Bhārat-varsh, syn. Jambudvīp)
subs: (˚sha+aś˚), s.m. Subsistence for a year; annual allowance or salary
(˚sha+av˚), s.m. 'The close of the rains,' the autumnal season, autumn
(˚sha+ay˚), s.m. A period of ten thousand years

s.m. One of the mountainous ranges supposed to separate the various Varshas or divisions of the globe from each other (six ranges are enumerated from north to south, viz. Himavat, Hem-kūṭ, Nishadh, Nīl, Śvet, and Śring-vān; Meru constitutes a seventh: other names are sometimes given to these ranges)
vulg. baras-din, s.m. The period of a year
adv. For the period of a year, for a whole year
s.m. A period of a thousand years
s.m. A hundred years, a century.

def: adj. Belonging to the rainy season; fit for, or suited to, the rains; growing in the rainy season; — belonging to a year, yearly, annual; — s.m. An annual pension, &c.; — any annually recurring festival, or rite, or observance.
adj. Yearly, annual.
s.m. The falling of rain, raining; rain.
v.t. See the pop. form barsānā.
s.m. See s.v. varsha or varsh.
part. Raining, showering; sprinkling.
adj. &c. See the pop. form barsātī.
part. adj. m. & f. See the pop. form barsāʼū.
s.m. = S ورشايت वर्षायुत varshāyut, s.m. See s.v. varsha or varsh.
s.m. = S ورشاوسان वर्षावसान varshāvasān, s.m. See s.v. varsha or varsh.

adj. Belonging to the rainy season; fit for, or suited to, the rains; growing in the rainy season; — belonging to a year, yearly, annual; — s.m. An annual pension, &c.; — any annually recurring festival, or rite, or observance.
v.n. See the pop. form barasnā.

ety: varsha, q.v.+wāṅ = Ap. Prk. वँओ, Prk. मओ; S. म+कः
def: adj. See the pop. form baraswāṅ.
adj. Yearly, annual.
s.m. Destruction, ruin; — a precipice; labyrinth, maze; any danger or difficulty in which one is embarrassed; any situation of danger or difficulty; embarrassment; — a whirlpool, vortex.
adj. Who or what abides or exists, abiding, existing, living; — given up (to), devoted or attached (to); — s.m. A sort of quail; — hoof (of a horse); — a sort of brass or bell-metal (syn. bidrī).

r: vārtāki, vārtākī, vārtāku, vārtāk, Solanum melongena, baiṅgan
def: s.f. = S وارتاکو वार्ताकु vārtāku, or वार्ताकी vārtāk, s.m. The egg-plant, Solanum melongena (syn. baiṅgan).

r: vārtāku, vārtāk, vārtāki, vārtākī, Solanum melongena, baiṅgan
def: s.m. = S وارتاکي वार्ताकि vārtāki, or वार्तिक vārtākī, s.f. The egg-plant, Solanum melongena (syn. baiṅgan).
adj. Turning round, revolving, moving; — being, existing, living; being present; actually taking place (see bartmān); — dwelling, remaining, abiding (in)
subs: or vartamān-kāl, s.m. (in Gram.) The present tense
adj. Of or relating to present time, or to the present tense.

def: s.m. Livelihood, subsistence; occupation, profession; earnings, hire, wages, salary (cf. vr̤itti, and br̤it).
s.f. Wick (of a lamp); a lamp; a candle; a match, &c. (i.q. battī, q.v.); — a ruled line; — a paint-brush; — ointment, unguent, perfume (for the person); rouge; eye-salve, collyrium.
adj. (f. -inī), Abiding, staying, resting, continuing; being, existing; situated (in; — used as last member of compounds, e.g. madhya-vartī, 'situated in the midst,' &c.).
s.f. Wick (of a lamp; see battī); — a paint-brush; — a species of quail, Perdix olivacea (see baṭer).
s.f. Abiding, staying, being; — livelihood, business, profession, trade; agriculture; — account, tidings, information, report, rumour, news, intelligence; word; conversation (see bāt)
subs: (-se), To hold conversation (with), to talk (with or to)
or vārttālāp (˚tā+āl˚), s.m. Conversation about (various) matters, discourse; intercourse; news; — vārttālāp karnā, To converse, &c.

def: s.m. A wooden pencil for writing on a board.

adj. Relating to news; bringing or conveying intelligence, &c.; — explanatory, glossarial; — s.m. An intelligencer, informer, a spy; an agent, envoy; — a man of the third or Vaiśya tribe, a husbandman, trader, handicraftsman; — an explanatory or supplementary rule, critical gloss or annotation (added to a grammatical or philosophical sūtra).
adj. Round, circular; globular, spherical.
s.m. The god of the waters, and the regent of the western quarter; — the tree Crataeva roxburghii (i.q. varaṇ; cf. baruṇ).

s.f. The western quarter or region presided over by Varuṇa, the west; — name of the twenty-fifth Nakshatr or lunar asterism (of which Varuṇa is the ruling deity); — a particular kind of spirit (prepared from hogweed ground with the juice of the date or palm and then distilled); — a species of dūb grass.
s.f. corr. 1˚, of bārūt; — 2˚, of barūt, qq.v.
s.m. A sort of wooden ledge or fender fastened round a chariot as a defence against collision; — armour, coat of mail; a shield (made of leather, &c.); — skin, leather; — a house.
s.f. Multitude, troop, host, army; — name of an Apsaras.

s.m. A man of low origin, a barbarian; an outcast; — an ignorant person; — a country inhabited by barbarians; — woolly or curly hair; — a kind of shrub, Clerodendrum siphonanthus; — a sort of basil, Ocymum pilosum; — the noise or clash of weapons; — a mode of dancing; — vermilion; — gum-myrrh; — yellow sandal-wood.

ety: warwarā˚ = S. वर्वर+ā = āw = Prk. आव, or आवे = S. आपय (caus. aug.)
def: v.n. To babble, prate, talk nonsense, jabber, mutter, &c.
s.m. = S وروٿي वर्वटी varvaṭī, s.f. A sort of kidney-bean. Dolichos catjang.
s.f. = S وروٿ वर्वट varvaṭ, s.m. A sort of kidney-bean. Dolichos catjang.
s.f. (of varya), A girl choosing her own husband; — a marriageable girl, a young maiden.

part. adj. (f. -ā), Fit to be chosen, eligible; — to be solicited, or wooed, to be asked or obtained in marriage; — estimable, worthy, excellent, eminent, chief, principal, the best; — s.m. Kām-dev, the god of love.

ety: abst. s. fr. warz-īdan; — warz˚, rt. Zend varez = S. वर्ह (वृंह्, वृंहति)
def: s.f. Custom, habit; exercise; athletic exercise; use; labour, exertion; study; — gain; — abstinence; sobriety
subs: s.m. House or hall for exercise
(-kī), To exercise oneself (in), to practise; to go through athletic exercises.
wety: Borrowed from Classical Persian وَرْزِش (warziš).

def: s.m. Dwelling, resting, living, residing; — dwelling-piace, &c. (i.q. bās, q.v.); — site, situation; — perfuming, perfume, &c. (i.q. bās, q.v.); — dressing; dress; cloth, clothes, a garment.
s.m. = وش vaś, q.v. (and cf. bas).
s.f. (Dakh.) Offspring, children, family.

adj. (f. -ā), Willing; subdued, tamed, humbled; subject, submissive, obedient; overpowered, enthralled; — subdued by oharms or incantations; fascinated, charmed, enchanted; — s.m. & postp. Wish, desire, will, authority, &c. (see bas, the pop. form); — the state of being tamed or overpowered; subjection
subs: adv. & s.m. (f. -iṇī), Subduing, overpowering, humbling, &c.; — one who overpowers another, &c.
s.f. The act of subduing or overpowering (esp. by drugs, gems, charms, or incantations), enchanting, charming, enthralling; — the drugs, &c. so used
part. (f. -ā), Become subject, subjugated, brought under control, subdued, tamed; enthralled, bewitched, fascinated, enamoured
part. (f. -ā), Subjected to the will (of another), brought into subjection, &c. (i.q. vaśī-bhūt, q.v.)
s.m. The act of making subject, subjugating; — overcoming by charms, &c. (i.q. vaś-kriyā, q.v.). (For other compounds see bas).

def: s.m. = vās, and bāsā, qq.v.
s.f. The plant Justicia ganderussa.
s.f. Marrow, adeps, fat, grease, suet, any fatty oily substance; oily exudation; the brain.
s.f. A woman; a wife; a daughter; a husband's sister; — a cow; a female elephant; — a barren woman; — a barren cow.

ety: for A. وسالة, prob. post-classical, fr. وسّل 'to strive to obtain access to,' ii of وسل, not in use
def: s.f. Mediation; channel, medium, means (see wasīla).

s.m. Perfuming; fumigating with fragrant vapours or incense; infusing, steeping; — abiding; abode; — a particular posture in sitting (sitting with the knees bent and the feet turned backwards); — any receptacle or vessel; a water-jar; a box; a basket; — knowledge; — cloth, clothing, clothes, a garment; an envelope.
s.m. Covering, clothing, &c.; — dwelling, residence, &c. (see basan).
s.f. = باسنا bāsnā, q.v.
s.m. The vernal season, spring, &c. (see basant); — the deified personification of spring; — diarrhœa, dysentery; small-pox
subs: s.m. The tree Cordia myxa, or C. latifolia; (lit. 'having blossoms in spring')

(˚ta+ut˚), s.m. The spring festival or celebration of the return of spring (formerly held on the full moon of Ćait but now on the full moon of Phāgūn, being identified with the Dol-jātrā or Holī). (For other compounds see basant.)
wety: Learned borrowing from Sanskrit वसन्त (vasantá). Doublet of بَہار (bahār) and بَسَنْت (basant).

def: adj. (f. -ī), Relating to spring, vernal; suitable to spring; produced in the spring season; — attentive, or diligent (in the performance of religious ceremonies, &c.); — s.m. The Indian cuckoo; — a camel; — any young animal; — the southern or western wind; — a dissolute man; a catamite.

s.f. A kind of large creeper, Gaertnera racemosa; — a species of jasmine, Jasminum auriculatum; — the trumpet-flower; — a festival in honour of Kām-dev (held in the month Ćait; — in some places Durgā is worshipped at this festival); — name of a deity.
adj. Of or relating to spring; — of yellow colour, yellow, orange-coloured (the favourite colour of Krishṇ); — (S. vasanta+ikā) s.f. Name of a scale in (Hindū) music, &c. (see basantī).
s.m. A day; — a kind of snake; — the sleeping together of a couple on the first night after marriage.
s.m. (dialec.) = osārā, or usārā, q.v.

ety: v.n. fr. وسط 'to sit in the midst (of
def: s.m. Middle, centre; — adj. Middle, central; centrical; — middling, of a middling sort or class, &c.; — right, just, proper, suitable; — just, equitable; — exquisite, excellent; great, magnificent; opulent.

ety: for A. وساطة, v.n. fr. وسط 'to penetrate to the middle'; see wasat̤
def: s.f. Interposition; intervention; intercession; mediation; arbitration; — medium; means
subs: (-kī), Without the interposition or intervention, &c. (of), directly, not mediately.

def: s.f. A peopled or inhabited place, &c. (see bastī, the pop. form); — night
adj. Middle, central, midmost; — middling, of middling sort or class, &c.; moderate; intervening, intermediate; average
(dialec. or Braj), corr. 1˚ of vāśā; — 2˚ of bāsha, qq.v.
adj. Belonging to Indra; — accompanied by the Vasus; — s.m. A name of Indra, the god of meteoric phenomena.
s.f. pl. (of waṣīyat, q.v.), Precepts, commandments; testaments, wills.

ety: act. part. of وسع 'to be large, or ample'
def: adj. Large, ample, capacious, spacious, wide, roomy.
wety: From Arabic وَاسِع (wāsiʕ).

def: s.m. Describing; declaring; praising; — description, expression of qualities; praise, encomium; attribute; epithet; quality, property; — merit, virtue, worth
subs: s.m. A compound participle; the adj. or part. in a compound noun (e.g. numā in rah-numā, 'showing the way')
(-kā), To give a description (of), to describe; to praise, &c.
s.m. A descriptive epithet; an adjective.
